race.comment: CELESTIAL GRACE (7) had genuine excuses from the poor draw at latest when a tiring tenth over 1300m at Canberra. Gets a better set-up for this fourth-up and look for to savage the line. CHISATO (8) resumes after she failed to fire in her first campaign. Looks ready to go after the two excellent trials and ticks a few boxes from the inside draw. LOBBYIST (11) showed a ton of grit first-up with a fighting second over 1200m at Tamworth. Strips fitter and and no surprise to see her figure prominently. BUNDORAN (1) on the quick back-up after going under narrowly as fav when third over 1100m at Armidale. Can slide across from the wide gate and take a had in the finish.
